goal: Fix the traced opening collapse: in 4P, hard-forbid offensive captures of enemy-owned planets before turn 60 so the opening builds a holdable neutral cluster instead of trading ships in failed early attacks.
change: New _apply_opening_neutral_focus() in main.py: masks enemy-target offensive candidates to -inf while step < opening_no_enemy_turn (4P only).
Applied after the true_one_ply rescore, before source-budget/greedy. Neutral and reinforcement targets untouched.
Enabled in CONFIG_4P; all 4P modes. 2P unaffected.
trace_evidence: seed 1399615834: sample130 collapses 3p->1p at t40 and dies t52; sample135 holds 3p at t40, is 4p/227sh at t60 (alive, competitive).
